title: Document how to build on macOS (stubbing out libostree support)

comments.body:
How about 
cd $GOPATH/src/github.com/projectatomic/skopeo && make binary-local  BUILTAGS=$([ $(uname) == "Linux1" ]  && echo containers_image_ostree_stub)

> How about
cd $GOPATH/src/github.com/projectatomic/skopeo && make binary-local BUILTAGS=$([ $(uname) == "Linux1" ] && echo containers_image_ostree_stub)

Yes, such a condition should exist, but it should exist inside the `Makefile`’s `binay-local` target, not in the end-user instructions. Hoping for a tested PR… which is now in #382.
